title: HTML - Wikipedia
content: HTML - Wikipedia Jump to content Frae Wikipedia, the free beuk o knawledge HTML document HyperText Markup Language (HTML) is a markup leid uised tae create documents intendit tae bi accessed wae a wab brouser. HTML is a wab staundart[1] and is aften uised alangside ither wab staundarts includin Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) and JavaScript. HTML documents that are available on the Warld Wide Wab are commonly kent as wab pages. References[eedit | edit soorce] ↑ "Standards – W3C". W3C. Retrieved 11 September 2020.
